name: Surburban Bus Transportation
registry_source: NY DOS (via nyopendata.com DOS ID 1775314); Bizapedia confirms entity Suburban Bus Transportation, Inc., Bellmore, NY
notes: No confident SAFER match: USDOT 1972364 returned for 'SUBURBAN TRANSPORTATION INC' but address is 1340 East Water St, Syracuse NY 13210 — does not match the target (1881 Newbridge Rd, North Bellmore, NY 11710). SAFER keyword searches for 'SUBURBAN BUS TRANSPORTATION' and 'SUBURBAN BUS' returned no records, suggesting this carrier may operate without a USDOT registration (NY intrastate non-CDL school bus carriers are sometimes not required to register with FMCSA) or under a different DBA. Company name in source spelled 'Surburban' (sic). NY DOS entity Suburban Bus Transportation, Inc. (DOS ID 1775314) filed 11/26/1993, Nassau County, status ACTIVE, process address 1881 Newbridge Road, Bellmore 11710 — exact address match to target.

name: ABC Transit Inc
registry_source: PA Department of State Business Entity Search (entity #4194094, Domestic Business Corporation)
notes: Address match note: input address (320 Poplar St, Pittsburgh/Etna PA 15223) is one of ABC Transit's nine garage locations; the FMCSA principal address and PA DOS registered address is 714 Ekastown Rd, Sarver, PA 16055. Same company. School bus and school van company serving Western PA with 25,000+ students daily. PA entity #4194094 registered 06/12/2013 (note: company existed operationally prior — likely re-incorporated; current PA entity record dates to 2013). Manager of Safety: Brian P Davies (per Etna Borough directory).

name: Liberty Lines Bus Assoc Inc
fmcsa_address: 475 Saw Mill River Rd, Yonkers, NY 10701
registry_source: NY DOS / Wikipedia: Liberty Lines Transit Inc formed via 1982 merger of Westchester subsidiaries; Liberty Lines lineage dates to 1953
notes: Strong match — FMCSA carrier address (475 Saw Mill River Rd, Yonkers NY 10701) is an exact match to target input address. Note legal name discrepancy: input lists 'Liberty Lines Bus Assoc Inc' but the FMCSA/NY-registered entity is 'Liberty Lines Transit Inc'. Same operating company (Westchester County Bee-Line operator). Founded 1953 as Liberty Coaches; current entity Liberty Lines Transit, Inc. formed by 1982 merger of route subsidiaries. ~610 union + 140 non-union employees, fleet of ~350 vehicles per company; FMCSA shows higher 642 power-units count (likely includes trailers/non-revenue). NY DOS DOS-ID not retrieved (NY DOS public-inquiry page would not load).

name: Baumann & Sons Buses School
officers: Ronald A. Baumann (President), Constance Baumann-Gilman (Secretary), Richard Baumann (VP)
registry_source: NY DOS (Baumann & Sons Buses, Inc.); Bloomberg, NLRB, multiple sources confirm 1959 founding in NY
notes: USDOT 1133656 (BAUMANN & SONS BUSES INC) is listed as INACTIVE in SAFER. Company founded 1959, headquartered at 3355 Veterans Memorial Highway, Ronkonkoma, NY 11779 with East Northport yard at 24 Railroad Ave (target address — confirmed match). Company filed Chapter 11 bankruptcy 2020 (Case 8:20-bk-72121, EDNY); related labor disputes with TWU. Bohemia location (3040 Veterans Memorial Hwy) is now CLOSED per Yelp. Company status is effectively inactive/wound-down post-bankruptcy. Affiliated entities: Acme Bus Corp, Alert Coach Lines (Suffolk County 1966+). No alternate active USDOT found via SAFER keyword search.

name: Tri County Transportation
safety_rating: None (last compliance review 2018-09-17, no rating assigned)
officers: Jerry Tibbott (current owner since 1992); founded by William and Janet Tibbott
registry_source: PA Department of State — specific entity number not retrieved (search portal CAPTCHA-protected); FMCSA registration 1993-03-10; founding 1964 confirmed by company history and multiple secondary sources
notes: Strong match — FMCSA principal address (406 Magnolia St, Northern Cambria PA 15714) is exact match to target. Founded 1964 by William and Janet Tibbott; son Jerry Tibbott took over 1992 with 38 vehicles. Acquired by Beacon Mobility in November 2022 (along with Health Ride Plus). Currently operates 188 school buses with 241 drivers per company website; FMCSA shows 317 power units / 230 drivers (FMCSA figure likely includes all owned vehicles including non-school-bus units and Health Ride Plus paratransit assets). Additional yards: Carrolltown (145 Sunset Rd) and New Florence (6850 US-22). Serves 7 school districts in Northern Cambria, Cambria Heights, Portage, United, Penns Manor, Purchase Line, Punxsutawney + Appalachia IU 28.
